description: Use the N/config module to access NetSuite configuration settings. The config.load(options) method returns a record.Record object. Use the record.Record object members to access configuration settings. You do not need to load the N/record module to do this.

methods.name: load
methods.description: Loads a record.Record object that encapsulates the specified configuration page.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The NetSuite configuration page you want to access. Use values from config.Type enum.

enums.name: Type
enums.description: Holds the string values for supported configuration objects. Use this enum to set the value of the NetSuite configuration page you want to access in the config.load(options) method.

members.name: COMPANY_INFORMATION
members.description: Company Information page (Setup > Company > Company Information)

members.name: COMPANY_PREFERENCES
members.description: General Preferences page (Setup > Company > General Preferences)

members.name: ACCOUNTING_PREFERENCES
members.description: Accounting Preferences page (Setup > Accounting > Accounting Preferences)

members.name: ACCOUNTING_PERIODS
members.description: Accounting Periods page (Setup > Accounting > Manage Accounting Periods)

members.name: TAX_PERIODS
members.description: Tax Periods page (Setup > Accounting > Manage Tax Periods)

members.name: FEATURES
members.description: Enable Features page (Setup > Company > Enable Features)
